findings.evidence: `FinitePreadditive.lean:42` has `example : Preadditive (FGComoduleCat.{u, v, w} R C) := inferInstance`; Mathlib has the general `instance fullSubcategory (Z : ObjectProperty C) : Preadditive Z.FullSubcategory` at `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Preadditive/Basic.lean:118`.
findings.fix: Remove the special-case example and rely on the generic instance, or add actual FGComoduleCat-specific concrete lemmas if those are the intended API.
findings.issue: The `Preadditive (FGComoduleCat R C)` fact is added only as an anonymous special-case `example`, while Mathlib already provides the natural general instance for every full subcategory.

findings.evidence: `FinitePreadditive.lean:45` has `example : (FGComoduleCat.incl (R := R) (C := C)).Additive := inferInstance`; Mathlib has `instance fullSubcategoryInclusion_additive ... (Z : ObjectProperty C) : Z.ι.Additive` at `Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Preadditive/AdditiveFunctor.lean:182`.
findings.fix: Do not duplicate the generic theorem as a Tau-specific `example`; either rely on `ObjectProperty.fullSubcategoryInclusion_additive` or add named concrete simplification lemmas for the finite comodule category.
findings.issue: The additive inclusion fact is likewise only an anonymous FGComoduleCat special case of Mathlib's general full-subcategory inclusion instance.

summary: The PR adds only Tau-specific anonymous checks for facts that already exist generically in Mathlib; that is the wrong API level for this material.
